findings.description: Section s7 merges the RST h2 section 'ファイルをデータベースに登録する' (>2000 chars plain text) with all of its h3 subsections (フォーマット定義ファイルパスの指定, 精査エラー発生時のメッセージID指定, 精査処理を実装したクラス・メソッドの指定, データベース一括登録, データベース一括登録（独自実装）, plus h4 sub-subsections 形式エラー/精査エラー/ファイルが空の場合) into a single section without splitting. Per V3 rule, a large RST h2 with h3 subsections and >=2000 chars that is not split in the knowledge file should be reported.
findings.source_evidence: Source heading 'ファイルをデータベースに登録する' (=====) contains 6 named h3/h4 subsections spanning hundreds of lines of content with multiple code examples.

findings.description: s7 hints are missing several PascalCase class names and annotation names that appear in the section content: `MessageUtil` (used in 形式エラー and 精査エラー code examples), `MessageLevel` (used in same code examples), and `@OnError` (annotation on the main doSaveFile code example).
findings.source_evidence: Source 形式エラー section: `MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, ...)`. Source code example: `@OnError(type = ApplicationException.class, path = "/path/to/forward")`. V4 rule requires PascalCase class names and @Annotation names from content to be included in hints.
